About Me

Turning Ideas Into Real Products

I'm Shani Prajapati — a first-year Software Engineering student at Karnavati University, Ahmedabad. I build things that live on the internet.

From full-stack web apps to machine learning-powered tools, I love solving real problems with code. I care deeply about clean design, solid architecture, and user experience.

Beyond code, I actively compete in national hackathons — SIH, Google Cloud, and 36-hour sprints — where tight deadlines sharpen my skills. I believe the best way to learn is to build, ship, and iterate.

Featured Work

Project Highlights

AI · Python · Web

AI Exam Proctor

An intelligent exam proctoring system using computer vision to detect suspicious behavior in real-time during online exams. Built with Python, HTML, CSS & JS.

Live Demo ↗
Web App · Full Stack

University Event Registration System

A complete platform for managing university events with real-time seat tracking, user authentication, and an admin dashboard.

Live Demo ↗
Machine Learning · Full Stack

Used Car Price Prediction

ML-powered web app predicting used car prices using regression algorithms, integrated with a Python Flask backend and interactive frontend.

Live Demo ↗
Data Science · Security

Credit Card Fraud Detection

Real-time fraud detection system using ML classification. Features interactive data visualization dashboards with high-accuracy transaction analysis.

Live Demo ↗
